g.title: serial.issuance:creator->actor.usr:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (creator) REFERENCES actor.usr(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: serial.issuance:editor->actor.usr:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (editor) REFERENCES actor.usr(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: serial.issuance:subscription->serial.subscription:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (subscription) REFERENCES serial.subscription(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: serial.issuance:caption_and_pattern->serial.caption_and_pattern:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (caption_and_pattern) REFERENCES serial.caption_and_pattern(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: serial.item:issuance->serial.issuance:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (issuance) REFERENCES serial.issuance(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: serial.materialized_holding_code:issuance->serial.issuance:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (issuance) REFERENCES serial.issuance(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
